title: Hospira S.P.A - Canada.ca
content:
Health Canada is restricting the importation of drugs from Hospira S.P.A. in Liscate, Italy , due to data integrity concerns.
These lists are based on the most recent information received by Health Canada as of June 12, 2015, from various importers and companies and include information submitted to Health Canada as part of the licensing process. The lists will continue to be updated as new information becomes available.

## Medically Necessary Products
The following products have been identified as medically necessary by Health Canada. This list is based on the most recent information received by Health Canada as of June 12, 2015. The list will continue to be updated as new information becomes available.
Drug Identification Number
Hospira Healthcare Corporation
Epinephrine injection 1mg/mL
Oxytocin injection 10unit/mL
Sterile Vancomycin hydrochloride 500mg/vial (10mL)
Sterile Vancomycin hydrochloride 1g/vial (20mL)
Synagis (Palivizumab 50mg/vial)
Synagis (Palivizumab 100mg/vial)

## Non-Medically Necessary Products
The following products have been identified as non-medically necessary by Health Canada. This list is based on the most recent information received by Health Canada as of June 12, 2015. The list will continue to be updated as new information becomes available.
Drug Identification Number
Hospira Healthcare Corporation
Ephedrine Sulfate Injection
Scopolamine hydrobromide injection 0.4mg/mL
Scopolamine hydrobromide injection 0.6mg/mL
Cisatracurium Besylate
